parameters.description: A filtering query parameter allowing a comma-separated list of filters. * Each filter can be one of the following: * Fixed options: `recruiting`, `notRecruiting` * Dynamic options: `fieldName`+`condition`+`number`. Each dynamic filter is made out of 3 parts separated by colon `:`: * * `fieldName` is one of: `id`, `type`, `daysOld`, `rating`, `dailyIncome`, `weeklyIncome`, `dailyCustomers`, `weeklyCustomers` * * `condition` is one of: `=`, `!=`, ` =`, `>`, `Equal`, `NotEqual`, `Less`, `LessOrEqual`, `GreaterOrEqual`, `Greater` * * `number`: any integer value * Examples: `filters=recruiting`, `filters=weeklyIncome:>=:20000,id:<:1000,notRecruiting`, `filters=type:Equal:10,rating:=:10,dailyIncome:<=:6666666`
